question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?

query.sparql: SELECT ?item ?itemLabel WHERE { wd:Q761383 wdt:P138 ?item. SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en". } }

question.string: Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?

among the founders of tencent company, who has been member of national people’s congress?

Apart from the book series the witcher, name all of the author’s notable work.
are brooke raboutou and colin duffy from same state of the usa?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?brookeState ?colinState
WHERE {
  wd:Q105713834 wdt:P19 ?brookeBirthPlace .
  wd:Q105713833 wdt:P19 ?colinBirthPlace .
  ?brookeBirthPlace wdt:P131 ?brookeState .
  ?colinBirthPlace wdt:P131 ?colinState .
  FILTER (?brookeState = ?colinState)
}

can i play don't starve on play station 4?

How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?president) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?president p:P35 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P35 wd:Q159 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?date .
  FILTER (?date > "1990-01-01"^^xsd:date)
}

question.string: Did adam ondra win a medal in the 2020 summer olympics?

SELECT ?medal ?event
WHERE {
  wd:Q1334420 wdt:P2522 ?medal .
  ?medal wdt:P361 wd:Q204854 .
  ?medal wdt:P710 ?event .
  FILTER (?event = wd:Q106044118)
}

question.string: Did the Chicago Bulls win at least two seasons of the NBA championship?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?team ?seasonCount
WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P31 wd:Q1427014 .
  ?team wdt:P5138 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P3450 wd:Q18156668 .
  ?season wdt:P2522 ?championship .
  ?championship wdt:P2522 wd:Q18156668 .
  FILTER (?team = wd:Q172761)
  {
    SELECT ?team (COUNT(DISTINCT ?season) AS ?seasonCount)
    WHERE {
      ?team wdt:P31 wd:Q1427014 .
      ?team wdt:P5138 ?season .
      ?season wdt:P3450 wd:Q18156668 .
      ?season wdt:P2522 ?championship .
      ?championship wdt:P2522 wd:Q18156668 .
      FILTER (?team = wd:Q172761)
    }
    GROUP BY ?team
  }
}
FILTER (?seasonCount > 1)

question.string: Did Haruki Murakami receive the Nobel Prize in Literature?
Did Kobe Bryant leave the Lakers when LeBron James joined that team?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?lebronStart ?kobeEnd
WHERE {
  wd:Q36159 p:P54 ?lebronStatement .
  ?lebronStatement ps:P54 wd:Q157363 .
  ?lebronStatement pq:P580 ?lebronStart .

  wd:Q25369 p:P54 ?kobeStatement .
  ?kobeStatement ps:P54 wd:Q157363 .
  ?kobeStatement pq:P582 ?kobeEnd .

  FILTER (?lebronStart <= ?kobeEnd)
}

question.string: Did Rawson Marshall Thurber, the director of Red Notice also direct Titanic?
Did Venice at any point belong to the Austrian Empire?
Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?tencent wdt:P112 ?founder .
  ?founder wdt:P69 ?university .
}
GROUP BY ?university
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) > 1)

question.string: Do all of batman’s partner speak english as native language?
How many spouses do head of states have on average?

query.sparql:
SELECT (AVG(COUNT(DISTINCT ?spouse)) AS ?averageSpouses)
WHERE
{
  ?headOfState p:P35 ?headOfStateStatement .
  ?headOfStateStatement ps:P35 ?headOfStateValue .
  ?headOfState wdt:P26 ?spouse .
}

question.string: Was there at least one Formula 1 event on the AVUS?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?event
WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P793 wd:Q2418753 .
  ?event wdt:P585 ?date .
  ?circuit wdt:P31 wd:Q483247 .
  ?event wdt:P276 ?circuit .
}

question.string: Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?lemma WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P518 ?turkishVerb .
  ?turkishVerb wdt:P724 ?forma .
  FILTER(STRLEN(?forma) > 2) .
  FILTER(STRENDS(LCASE(?forma), "uş")) .
  ?item wdt:P5817 ?lemma .
}

question.string: From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?country (COUNT(?winner) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q190379 .
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country .
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1

query.sparql:
SELECT ?year ?population
WHERE {
  wd:Q593 Q1082 ?populationStatement .
  ?populationStatement pq:P585 ?year .
  FILTER (?year > "2006-01-01"^^xsd:date)
  ?populationStatement ps:P1082 ?population .
  FILTER (?population > 1599000)
}

question.string: In how many years did Kobe Bryant receive an NBA All-Defensive Team award?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?year (COUNT(DISTINCT ?award) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?award wdt:P2517 wd:Q48212 .
  ?award wdt:P735 ?player .
  FILTER(?player = wd:Q169452 || ?player = wd:Q25369) .
  ?award wdt:P585 ?year .
}
GROUP BY ?year
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?player) = 2)

question.string: In which federal state is the Veltins brewery headquarter?
In which stadium do the New York Yankees play?
In which countries is the Himalayas located?
Was Isfahan a capital in the year 934?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?start ?end
WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q42053 AS ?item)
  ?item p:P36 ?capitalStatement .
  ?capitalStatement ps:P36 ?capital .
  ?capitalStatement pq:P580 ?start .
  FILTER (?start <= "934-01-01"^^xsd:date) .
  OPTIONAL { ?capitalStatement pq:P582 ?end .
    FILTER (?end > "934-01-01"^^xsd:date) .
  }
  FILTER (!BOUND(?end))
}

question.string: What is the song Vogue by Madonna named after?
in which language does the united stated have the shortest short name?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?lang ?langLabel (MIN(LENGTH(?shortName)) AS ?shortNameLength)
WHERE
{
  wd:Q30 p:P1813 ?shortNameStatement .
  ?shortNameStatement ps:P1813 ?shortName .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?shortName), 'en')) .
  ?shortNameStatement prov:wasDerivedFrom ?langStatement .
  ?langStatement ps:P407 ?lang .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}
GROUP BY ?lang ?langLabel
ORDER BY ?shortNameLength

question.string: Does Bremerhaven's local dialing code start with 4?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel WHERE {
  BIND("Bremerhaven" @en AS ?name)
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q486748
  ; wdt:P402 ?dialCode
  ; rdfs:label ?itemLabel
  FILTER(lang(?itemLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(CONTAINS(str(?dialCode), "4"))
}

WHERE
{
  wd:Q28865 wdt:P31 ?item .

  FILTER (LANGMATCHES(LANG(?itemLabel), "en")).
  FILTER(CONTAINS(str(?item), "programming language"))
}

SELECT ?trenchDepth ?everestElevation

  BIND(wd:Q4957 AS ?marianaTrench) .
  BIND(wd:Q513 AS ?mountEverest) .
  ?marianaTrench p:P4511 ?trenchStatement .
  ?trenchStatement ps:P4511 ?trenchDepth .
  ?mountEverest p:P2044 ?everestStatement .
  ?everestStatement ps:P2044 ?everestElevation .
  FILTER (?trenchDepth > ?everestElevation) .
}

question.string: Is the Linux Foundation verified on Twitter?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?twitterUsername ?verified
WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q81970 AS ?entity).
  ?entity wdt:P2002 ?twitterUsername.
  FILTER(EXISTS { ?entity wdt:P2002 ?twitterUsername. })
  FILTER(EXISTS { ?entity wdt:P1630 ?verified. })
  FILTER CONTAINS(str(?verified), "verified")
}

SELECT ?item ?itemLabel
WHERE
{
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q17158414 .

question.string: What is the Chinese zodiac animal that follows the ox?
What is the combined total revenue of three largest Big Tech companies ordered by number of employees?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?company ?companyLabel (SUM(?revenue) AS ?totalRevenue)
WHERE {
  ?company wdt:P31 wd:Q483838 .
  ?company wdt:P2139 ?revenue .
  ?company wdt:P112 ?employees .
  FILTER (?company = wd:Q95 || ?company = wd:Q379587 || ?company = wd:Q208614)
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}
GROUP BY ?company ?companyLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?employees)
LIMIT 3

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel (SUM(?number) AS ?total)
WHERE
{
  wd:Q34370 wdt:P1641 ?item .
  ?item wdt:P1174 ?number .
  FILTER (xsd:integer(?number))
}
GROUP BY ?item ?itemLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?total)

WHERE {

WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q183 AS ?germany) .
  BIND(wd:Q36 AS ?poland) .

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?game) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q7889 .
  ?game wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  wd:Q24514682 wdt:P577 ?deadByDaylightReleaseDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?releaseDate) = YEAR(?deadByDaylightReleaseDate)) .
  FILTER(?game != wd:Q24514682)
}

SELECT ?item ?itemLabel
WHERE
{
  ?item wdt:P6885 ?region .
  ?aztec wdt:P6885 ?region .
  FILTER (?item != ?aztec) .
  ?aztec wdt:P112 ?foundingDate .
  ?item wdt:P112 ?foundingDateItem .
  FILTER (?foundingDateItem = ?foundingDate) .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
  ?aztec wdt:P361 wd:Q897 .
}

  ?series wdt:P40 ?blackDeath .
  FILTER CONTAINS(str(?series), "Black")
}
